problem_statement: Search decisions and receipts can record conflict refs, but without a dedicated conflict map the control plane can lose source disagreements before research synthesis or retrieval expansion.
success_criteria: ResearchSourceConflictMap validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
ResearchSourceConflictMap binds citation refs, source digest refs, contradiction class, freshness impact, and follow-up sensing needs

ResearchSourceConflictMap blocks live web search, source contact, connector calls, raw source-body storage, secret storage, answer synthesis, current-claim authority, memory writes, publication, terminal closure, and success claims
ResearchSourceConflictMap rejects authority drift, raw body or digest drift, conflict citation drift, follow-up sensing drift, missing evidence refs, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
ResearchSourceConflictMap is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: research question remains hash-only in the Foundation example
source claim and summary evidence remain digest refs
conflict citation refs must be drawn from the source set
live search and source contact remain false
SearchDecision, SearchReceipt, LifeMeaningJudgment, and UAO refs remain explicit
